## [4.0.22] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Reasoning chain reranker (Codex v4.0.19 review #3)

Third patch acting on external Codex review. Replaces the "first match wins" derivation picker in `inject_reasoning_chain` with a scored ranker that prefers **curated + short + taxonomically-direct** chains and penalises **text-only + long + shared-target fan-out** derivations.

### Problem

Per Codex's v4.0.19 review, `Conversation::inject_reasoning_chain` selected the first derivation whose subject (then object) root matched the `noun_hint`. This is deterministic but semantically arbitrary вҖ” when multiple derivations exist for the same noun, the picker surfaced noisy ones:

- В«Р°Р»РјР°СӮСӢ РәТҜСҲРәРө ТӣР°СӮСӢСҒСӮСӢ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӢ РұР°СҖВ» вҖ” weak chain when cleaner curated alternatives available
- В«Р°РұР°Р№ вҖ” С…Р°Р»СӢТӣВ» (pre-v4.0.2) вҖ” text-only IsA chain when world_core В«Р°РұР°Р№ вҖ” РјР°РјР°РҪВ» existed
- В«ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– вҖ” Р°Р№РҪР°В» вҖ” weak proverb chain when R1 В«ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– вҖ” РұРөР»РіС–В» (curated from language_features.jsonl) existed

### Fix вҖ” `score_derivation` composite scoring

New `fn score_derivation(d, noun) -> i32` at `conversation.rs:525`. Composite score terms:

**Trust (source_chain provenance):**
- All sources `world_core/*`: **+4** (fully curated)
- Mixed world_core + text: +1
- All text-only: **вҲ’2**
- Empty chain (defensive): вҲ’2

**Chain length:**
- 0вҖ“1 sources: +2
- 2 sources: +1
- 3+: 0 (long chains drift)

**Rule weight (Codex ordering):**
- `R1_is_a_transitivity`, `R10_in_domain_inheritance`: **+3** (clean taxonomic)
- `R2`, `R3`, `R6`, `R7`, `R8`, `R9`: +2 (mereological/temporal)
- `R5_shared_is_a_target`, `R11_in_domain_shared_target`: **+1** (combinatorial fan-out вҖ” last resort)

**Subject-side preference** (preserves pre-v4.0.22 subject-first picking): +1 if subject root matches `noun`.

Tie-break by canonical triple `(subject, predicate, object)` for deterministic byte-identical runs.

### Selection flow

```
filter:   noun-match on either subject or object + passes_safety (curated_only_reasoning gate)
reduce:   max_by(score_derivation, then canonical-triple reverse tie-break)
render:   render_derivation_as_kazakh (unchanged)
```

Result: for the same noun, a fully-curated R1 chain (score вүҲ 10) always beats a mixed-source R5 chain (score вүҲ 4).

### Smoke-test with `adam_chat --safe`

All curated-only picks are now surfacing their strongest chain:

```
> Р°РұР°Р№ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: ТӣРҫСҖСӢСӮСӢРҪРҙСӢ: Р°РұР°Р№ вҖ” РјР°РјР°РҪ (РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә Р°СҖТӣСӢР»СӢ).
> РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ Р°РҪСӢТӣСӮР°РҙСӢРј: РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ РҝРөРҪ РјР°ТӣСӮР°РҪСӢСҲ РұС–СҖ-РұС–СҖС–РҪРө РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РөРәРөРҪ.
> Р°Р»РјР°СӮСӢ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: Р°Р»РјР°СӮСӢ РөСғСҖР°Р·РёСҸТ“Р° ТӣТұСҖР°РјСӢРҪР° РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РұС–СҖ РұУ©Р»С–РіС– СҖРөСӮС–РҪРҙРө СҲСӢТӣСӮСӢ.
> ТҡР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
РҗР№СӮСғСӢТЈСӢР· РұРҫР№СӢРҪСҲР°, РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ ТӣРёСҒСӢРҪРҙСӢ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ РұР°СҖ: ТӣРҫСҖСӢСӮСӢРҪРҙСӢ: ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– вҖ” РұРөР»РіС– (РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә Р°СҖТӣСӢР»СӢ).
```

Before v4.0.22 the first query often produced В«Р°РұР°Р№ вҖ” С…Р°Р»СӢТӣВ» (text noise); the last query produced В«ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– вҖ” Р°Р№РҪР°В» (proverb metaphor). Now both pick curated R1 chains.

### Tests

**488 passing** (+2 regression tests: `reranker_prefers_curated_over_text_only`, `reranker_prefers_shorter_chain`).

### Scope

One concern вҖ” derivation-selection ranking. No reasoner/extractor/data changes. Rendering layer (`render_derivation_as_kazakh`) untouched.

---

## [4.0.21] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Multi-word entity linker (Codex v4.0.19 review #2)

Second release acting on Codex's v4.0.19 review. Addresses finding #2: multi-word concepts in world_core (В«ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢВ», В«РҡТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–В», В«РҗСҒРҝР°РҪ РҙРөРҪРөСҒС–В», В«ТҡР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С–В», вҖҰ) were losing their referent at the dialog layer because the FST tokenizer splits the compound and `first_noun_root` picks only the first single-word token вҖ” so В«ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢВ» replied about В«ТӣТұСҒВ» (bird) instead of РңР»РөСҮРҪСӢР№ РҝСғСӮСҢ.

### Fix

Added `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES` const array in `crates/adam-dialog/src/semantics.rs` вҖ” **22 compound entities** auto-extracted from `data/world_core/*.jsonl` subjects/objects that contain a space. Sorted longest-first at compile time so the matcher returns on the first substring hit:

```
ТӣТұР№СҖСӢТӣСӮСӢ Р¶ТұР»РҙСӢР·, ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ УҷРҙРөРұРёРөСӮС–, СӮС–СҖСҲС–Р»С–Рә РёРөСҒС–, РҫСҖСӮР°Р»СӢТӣ Р°Р·РёСҸ,
Р¶ТҜРә РјР°СҲРёРҪР°СҒСӢ, Р°СҒРҝР°РҪ РҙРөРҪРөСҒС–, ТӣР°СҖР° СҒУ©Р·РҙРөСҖ, СӮР°Т“СӢ Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ, ТӣРҫР·СӢ РәУ©СҖРҝРөСҲ,
ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С–, СҒСғ ТӣРҫР№РјР°СҒСӢ, Р¶РөСҖ РұРөРҙРөСҖС–, РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–, СӮСғТ“Р°РҪ Р¶РөСҖ,
Р°РұР°Р№ Р¶РҫР»СӢ, СӮРөРјС–СҖ Р¶РҫР», ТӣСӢР· Р¶С–РұРөРә, РұР°СҒ РәРёС–Рј, ТӣТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ, Р°СҸТӣ РәРёС–Рј,
СҒР°СҖСӢ РјР°Р№, СӮР°СҒ Р¶РҫР»
```

New helper `multiword_entity_hint(input: &str) -> Option<String>` does a longest-match substring scan over the lowercased raw input. Substring match handles Kazakh inflection on the compound tail вҖ” e.g. В«ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢРҪСӢТЈ РұРөР№РҪРөСҒС–В» contains В«ТӣТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢВ» as a prefix of the inflected form.

New `best_noun_hint(input, parses)` combines: **multi-word match first, then `first_noun_root` fallback**. Called from `interpret_text_with_lexicon` at both `Intent::Unknown` exit points. The legacy `interpret(parses)` function (no raw input available) keeps single-noun-only behaviour вҖ” documented in-line.

### Smoke-test: compound entities now answer correctly

Pre-v4.0.21 вҖ” all of these answered about "ТӣТұСҒ" (bird) or generic:
```
> ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ вҶ’ ... about ТӣТұСҒ (bird)
```

Post-v4.0.21:
```
> ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә: ТӣТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ Р¶ТұР»РҙСӢР·Т“Р° ТӣР°СӮСӢСҒСӮСӢ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӢ РұР°СҖ (РёРөР»С–Рә РјТұСҖР°РіРөСҖР»С–Рә).
> РҡТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС– Р¶Р°Р№Р»СӢ
РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС– СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ Р°РҪСӢТӣСӮР°РҙСӢРј: Р°Р№ РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–РіРө ТӣТұСҖР°РјСӢРҪР° РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РұС–СҖ РұУ©Р»С–РіС– СҖРөСӮС–РҪРҙРө СҲСӢТӣСӮСӢ.
> РҗСҒРҝР°РҪ РҙРөРҪРөСҒС– РҙРөРіРөРҪ РҪРө
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: Р°СҒРҝР°РҪ РҙРөРҪРөСҒС– РҝРөРҪ Р¶ТұР»РҙСӢР· РұС–СҖ-РұС–СҖС–РҪРө РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РөРәРөРҪ.
> ТҡР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С–
РҗР№СӮСғСӢТЈСӢР· РұРҫР№СӢРҪСҲР°, РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ ТӣРёСҒСӢРҪРҙСӢ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ РұР°СҖ: ТӣРҫСҖСӢСӮСӢРҪРҙСӢ: ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С– вҖ” Р°Р№РҪР° (РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә Р°СҖТӣСӢР»СӢ).
```

В«ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢВ» now correctly connects to stars (Milky Way contains stars). В«РҡТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–В» produces the curated moon-as-part-of-solar-system chain. Only В«ТҡР°Р·Р°Тӣ СӮС–Р»С–В» still picks a weak proverb-chain вҖ” that's **Codex recommendation #3** (reasoning reranker), explicitly out of scope for this patch.

### Tests

**486 passing** (+2 regression tests: `multiword_entity_hint_matches_compound_entities` + `multiword_entity_hint_returns_none_for_simple_input`).

### Scope

One concern вҖ” multi-word entity resolution at the dialog layer. No reasoner / extractor changes, no data changes. The multi-word list is hand-maintained; future world_core compound additions must extend the const array (add a `world_core_multiword_coverage_test` regression in a future patch is queued).

---

## [4.0.20] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Lexicon sync with World Core (Codex v4.0.19 review #1)

First release acting on Codex's external review of v4.0.19. Codex's diagnosis was: **knowledge exists in the graph but doesn't reach the user through the dialog layer**. Root cause #1 вҖ” many `world_core` subject/object roots are not in the Lexicon, so `first_noun_root` (dialog's entry point) returns None and the query falls through to В«СӮТҜСҒС–РҪРұРөРҙС–РјВ».

### Audit findings

Cross-checking `data/world_core/*.jsonl` single-word subjects/objects against the Lexicon (curated `segmentation_roots.json` + Apertium import):

- **295 world_core roots missing from the Lexicon** вҖ” including core vocabulary (Р°Р№, СҒСғ, ТӣР°РҪ, ТӣСӢР·, ТӣРҫР», РұР°СҒ, РұРөСӮ вҖ” surprisingly absent) and every recent v4.0.9+ domain-authored root (РҪРөРјРөСҖРө, РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ, РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР°, РјРөРҙРұРёРәРө, РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР°, Р°СҒРҝР°Рҝ, РұР°Т“СӢСӮ, У©Р»СҲРөРј, etc.).

### Fix вҖ” one concern, with a caveat

Added **270 roots** to `data/tokenizer/segmentation_roots.json` with auto-classified vowel-harmony + final-sound-class via a heuristic script (Kazakh last-vowel harmony rule + final-char sound class). Roots all flagged with `v4020` id prefix for grep-ability of provenance.

**Filter вҖ” 25 roots deferred**: first attempt added all 295, which broke 4 tokenizer-contract tests (seg_253 Р°Р»Р°РјСӢРҪ, seg_282 ТӣСӢСҒТӣР°, seg_320 РұР°СҒТӣР° вҖ” short-root collisions with existing affix parses). Reverted and filtered to **length вүҘ 4 chars + NOT in a homograph risk-list** (Р°Р№, СҒСғ, Р°Тӣ, РөРҪ, СӮСғ, Р°Р», ТӣР°РҪ, ТӣРҫР», РұР°СҒ, РұРөСӮ, РјР°Р», РәРөСҲ, ТӣСӢСҒ, РҫТЈ, СҒРҫР», РҝРөСҲ, СҒУ©Р·, СӮР°Р», СӮТҜСҒ, РјСӢСҒ, ТӣР°Р·, ТӣР°СҖ, ТӣСӢР·, РұР°Сғ, Р°Р»Р°). These 25 need per-root FST priority handling in a future patch вҖ” one-concern discipline defers.

### Smoke-test: dialog now answers previously-silent queries

Pre-v4.0.20:
```
> РҪРөРјРөСҖРө СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
СӮТҜСҒС–РҪРұРөРҙС–Рј
> РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
СӮТҜСҒС–РҪРұРөРҙС–Рј
> РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР° СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
СӮТҜСҒС–РҪРұРөРҙС–Рј
> РјРөРҙРұРёРәРө СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
СӮТҜСҒС–РҪРұРөРҙС–Рј
```

Post-v4.0.20 (all 4 now produce curated-derived answers):
```
> РҪРөРјРөСҖРө СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: ТӣРҫСҖСӢСӮСӢРҪРҙСӢ: РҪРөРјРөСҖРө вҖ” Р°РҙР°Рј (РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә Р°СҖТӣСӢР»СӢ).
> РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ Р°РҪСӢТӣСӮР°РҙСӢРј: РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ РҝРөРҪ РјР°ТӣСӮР°РҪСӢСҲ РұС–СҖ-РұС–СҖС–РҪРө РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РөРәРөРҪ.
> РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР° СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
ТҡРҫР»РҙР° РұР°СҖ РҙРөСҖРөРәСӮРөСҖРҙРөРҪ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ ТӣТұСҖР°СҒСӮСӢСҖРҙСӢРј: ТӣРҫСҖСӢСӮСӢРҪРҙСӢ: РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР° вҖ” ТӣТұСҖР°Р» (РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РҫР№-СӮС–Р·РұРөРә Р°СҖТӣСӢР»СӢ).
> РјРөРҙРұРёРәРө СӮСғСҖР°Р»СӢ Р°Р№СӮСҲСӢ
РҗР№СӮСғСӢТЈСӢР· РұРҫР№СӢРҪСҲР°, РјСӢРҪР°РҙР°Р№ ТӣРёСҒСӢРҪРҙСӢ РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒ РұР°СҖ: РјРөРҙРұРёРәРө РҝРөРҪ РјРөСҖРіРөРҪ РұС–СҖ-РұС–СҖС–РҪРө РұР°Р№Р»Р°РҪСӢСҒСӮСӢ РөРәРөРҪ.
```

This is the **highest-impact single patch** of v4.0.x so far вҖ” it converts existing knowledge into actually-reachable answers.

### Measured delta on T4_200k full re-extract

| | v4.0.19 | v4.0.20 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Lexicon curated roots | 4 432 | **4 702** | **+270** |
| facts.json total | 13 709 | **15 448** | **+1 739 (+12.7 %)** |
| text `does_to` | 8 987 | **9 942** | **+955** |
| text `related_to` | 1 458 | **1 957** | **+499** |
| text `goes_to` | 1 537 | **1 681** | +144 |
| text `lives_in` | 280 | **325** | +45 |
| text `is_a` | 733 | **783** | +50 |
| text `has` | 224 | **269** | +45 |
| text `after` | 218 | **248** | +30 |
| text `part_of` | 149 | **153** | +4 |
| text `has_quantity` | 40 | **43** | +3 |
| **derivations total** | 18 406 | **19 395** | **+989 (+5.4 %)** |
| **R2 has_inheritance** | 707 | **1 110** | **+403** |
| **R8 after_transitivity** | 734 | **999** | **+265** |
| **R5 shared_is_a_target** | 15 477 | **15 621** | +144 |
| **R7 goes_to_via_part_of** | 373 | **505** | **+132** |
| R6 lives_in_via_part_of | 49 | 81 | +32 |
| R1 / R3 / R9 / R10 / R11 | minor | minor | Вұ few |
| Graph nodes | 3 472 | **3 515** | +43 |
| Graph edges | 12 360 | **13 725** | **+1 365 (+11 %)** |

### Why such large extract jump (+1 739 text facts)

Kazakh sentences involving the 270 new roots were previously **parseable only partially** вҖ” e.g. a sentence mentioning В«РҪРөРјРөСҖРө РәРөР»РҙС–В» would fail at the noun analysis, so downstream pattern matchers never fired. With the roots in Lexicon, every such sentence is now extractable. The +955 `does_to` gain is the largest вҖ” agent_verb patterns are the most common sentence shape in the Wikipedia + textbook corpus, and they were blocked wherever the subject or object noun was one of the newly-added roots.

### Tests

**484 passing** (unchanged вҖ” Lexicon addition didn't break any existing test after the filter was tightened).

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.20 (14 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.20 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | **10** | +3 |
| World Core domains | 14 | **29** | +15 |
| Lexicon curated roots | 4 432 | **4 702** | **+270** |
| facts.json total | 13 745 | **15 448** | **+1 703** |
| **Derivations** | **7 866** | **19 395** | **+11 529 (+146.6 %)** |
| Tests | 463 | **484** | +21 |

**Derivations 2.5Г— baseline.**

### Not in scope (queued)

- v4.0.21: Codex recommendation #2 вҖ” longest-match entity linker for multiword concepts (В«ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢВ» вҶ’ galaxy, not just В«ТӣТұСҒВ»).
- v4.0.22: Codex recommendation #3 вҖ” reasoning chain reranker (curated-first, short-first, R1/R10-first).
- v4.0.23: Codex recommendation #4 вҖ” tighten rule guards on broad hubs (Р°РҙР°Рј / Т“СӢР»СӢРј / Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ).
- Deferred: 25 short / homograph-prone roots (Р°Р№, СҒСғ, Р°Тӣ, etc.) вҖ” need per-root FST priority handling.

## [4.0.19] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” World Core batch #5: `kinship_extended.jsonl` + `constellations_kz.jsonl` + `measurements.jsonl` (R5 explodes via Р°РҙР°Рј bridge)

Fifth data batch. **Highest single-batch leverage ever**: +67.6 derivations per curated fact (previous peak: v4.0.9's +47/fact via 40-entry professions.jsonl saturating РјР°РјР°РҪ hub).

### Three new domains

1. **`kinship_extended.jsonl`** (18 entries) вҖ” extended Kazakh family terms. Hub: `СӮСғСӢСҒ IsA Р°РҙР°Рј` (kin IsA human вҖ” the load-bearing bridge). 17 СӮСғСӢСҒ children: Р°СӮР° / УҷР¶Рө part_of РҫСӮРұР°СҒСӢ + IsA СӮСғСӢСҒ, Р°Т“Р° / С–РҪС– / Р°РҝР° / ТӣР°СҖСӢРҪРҙР°СҒ / СҒС–ТЈР»С– / РҪРөРјРөСҖРө / СҲУ©РұРөСҖРө / Р¶РёРөРҪ / РұУ©Р»Рө / РҪР°Т“Р°СҲСӢ / Р°РұСӢСҒСӢРҪ / РәТҜР№РөСғ / РәРөР»С–РҪ IsA СӮСғСӢСҒ, plus ТұР» / ТӣСӢР· IsA РұР°Р»Р°. Standard Kazakh kinship lexicon, no loanwords.

2. **`constellations_kz.jsonl`** (6 entries) вҖ” traditional Kazakh astronomy. `СҲРҫТӣР¶ТұР»РҙСӢР· IsA Р°СҒРҝР°РҪ РҙРөРҪРөСҒС–` hub + 4 constellation children: Р–РөСӮС–ТӣР°СҖР°ТӣСҲСӢ (Ursa Major вҖ” "seven thieves"), Т®СҖРәРөСҖ (Pleiades), РўРөРјС–СҖТӣР°Р·СӢТӣ (Polaris вҖ” "iron stake", IsA Р¶ТұР»РҙСӢР·), ТӣТұР№СҖСӢТӣСӮСӢ Р¶ТұР»РҙСӢР· (comet вҖ” "tailed star"). Plus `ТҡТұСҒ Р¶РҫР»СӢ IsA РіР°Р»Р°РәСӮРёРәР°` (Milky Way вҖ” confirms implicit usage in astro_022).

3. **`measurements.jsonl`** (10 entries) вҖ” physical measurement concepts. `У©Р»СҲРөРј IsA РұРөР»РіС–` hub + 9 measurement children IsA У©Р»СҲРөРј: ТұР·СӢРҪРҙСӢТӣ, РәУ©Р»РөРј, СҒР°Р»РјР°Тӣ, РұРёС–РәСӮС–Рә, СӮРөСҖРөТЈРҙС–Рә, РөРҪ, ТӣР°СҲСӢТӣСӮСӢТӣ, Р¶СӢР»РҙР°РјРҙСӢТӣ, РҝР°Р№СӢР·.

### Totals

| | v4.0.18 | v4.0.19 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| World Core domains | 26 | **29** | +3 |
| World Core entries | 792 | **826** | +34 |
| World Core facts | 886 | **922** | +36 (kin_002 / kin_003 produce 2 facts each: part_of РҫСӮРұР°СҒСӢ + IsA СӮСғСӢСҒ) |

### Measured runtime delta (fast-path rebuild)

| rule | v4.0.18 | v4.0.19 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1 is_a_transitivity | 484 | **568** | **+84** |
| **R2 has_inheritance** | 450 | **707** | **+257** |
| R3 has_via_part_of | 51 | 51 | 0 |
| **R5 shared_is_a_target** | 13 414 | **15 477** | **+2 063** |
| R6 lives_in_via_part_of | 49 | 49 | 0 |
| R7 goes_to_via_part_of | 373 | 373 | 0 |
| R8 after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| R9 part_of_transitivity | 170 | **172** | +2 |
| **R10 in_domain_inheritance** | 102 | **124** | **+22** |
| R11 in_domain_shared_target | 146 | **151** | +5 |
| **derivations total** | 15 973 | **18 406** | **+2 433 (+15.2 %)** |
| Graph nodes | 3 452 | **3 472** | +20 |
| Graph edges | 12 325 | **12 360** | +35 |

### Effective leverage: +67.6 derivations per curated fact вҖ” new peak

**2 433 new derivations / 36 new curated facts = +67.6/fact** вҖ” exceeds v4.0.9's +47/fact peak. The combinatorial explosion is driven by one specific fact: `РәРёРҪ_001: СӮСғСӢСҒ IsA Р°РҙР°Рј`. This single bridge connects the entire 17-child kin cluster into the large Р°РҙР°Рј IsA hub. Every kin child вҶ’ IsA СӮСғСӢСҒ вҶ’ R1-transitively IsA Р°РҙР°Рј вҶ’ R5-related to every other IsA Р°РҙР°Рј descendant (including all professions via РјР°РјР°РҪРёСҸ, all animals, etc.).

### R5 explosion breakdown (rough)

- 17 kin children Г— each becomes IsA Р°РҙР°Рј via R1 transitive closure
- Р°РҙР°Рј hub pre-batch already had ~60+ descendants (indirect via IsA chains through РјР°РјР°РҪ, etc.)
- 17 Г— 60 new R5 pairs вүҲ ~1 000 from cross-cluster pairs
- Plus C(17,2) = 136 intra-kin pairs
- Plus second-order cascades
- **Observed +2 063** вҖ” consistent with bridge-fact multiplier effect

### R2 jump (+257) explanation

With kin cluster now IsA Р°РҙР°Рј via R1, and `Р°РҙР°Рј has СҒРөР·С–Рј` (from emotions.jsonl at v4.0.12), R2 derives В«X has СҒРөР·С–РјВ» for every kin child вҖ” 17+ new Has-inheritance derivations. Plus `Р°РҙР°Рј has РәУ©Р· / ТӣТұР»Р°Тӣ / РјРё / Р¶ТҜСҖРөРә / ТӣР°РҪ / У©РәРҝРө / РұР°СғСӢСҖ / РұТҜР№СҖРөРә / Р°СҒТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ / СҒР°СғСҒР°Тӣ / Р°СҸТӣ / ТӣРҫР»` (from body_parts.jsonl) вҖ” each kin child inherits all these via R2. 17 Г— ~12 body parts = ~200 R2 derivations. Rest from R1-chained СҶРөРҝРҫСҮРәРё.

### Lesson: bridge facts multiply

This batch demonstrates the **highest-ROI authoring pattern**: a single `X IsA РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫР№_С…Р°Рұ` bridge fact can multiply existing cluster connectivity by C(cluster_size, 2). v4.0.9's professions.jsonl did this via РјР°РјР°РҪ hub; v4.0.19 does it via Р°РҙР°Рј hub + kin cluster. Future high-leverage authoring: look for uncovered sub-hubs that could link into Р°РҙР°Рј / Р·Р°СӮ / РјТҜСҲРө / ТӣТұСҖР°Р» with minimal curation.

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.19 (13 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.19 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | **10** | +3 |
| World Core domains | 14 | **29** | +15 |
| World Core entries | 549 | **826** | +277 (+50.5 %) |
| facts.json total | 13 745 | 13 709 | вҲ’36 (post-audits) |
| **Derivations** | **7 866** | **18 406** | **+10 540 (+134 %)** |
| R5 shared-IsA | 5 940 | **15 477** | **+9 537 (+160 %)** |

**Derivations crossed 2.3Г— mark**. R5 shared-IsA alone has **2.6Г—** from baseline.

### Scope

Purely additive data. No code changes. 484 tests unchanged.

## [4.0.18] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” R11 InDomain shared-target (new reasoning rule) + v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised

Third rule-axis patch in v4.0.x. Reasoner roster **9 вҶ’ 10**. Also materialises the v4.0.17 is_closed_class fragment expansion via full T4_200k re-extract.

### Pattern

`A InDomain D вҲ§ B InDomain D (A вү  B) вҹ№ RelatedTo(A, B)` вҖ” identical structural shape to R5 (shared-IsA), applied to the InDomain predicate.

### Why InDomain-shared

After v4.0.14's R10 inheritance rule, the graph has rich InDomain coverage: 24 base + 102 R10-derived = **126 InDomain facts**. Each domain hub has multiple incoming InDomain edges:

- РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР°: ~26 incoming вҶ’ C(26,2) = 325 candidate pairs
- Р·РҫРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ: ~22 incoming вҶ’ C(22,2) = 231
- УҷРҙРөРұРёРөСӮ: ~18 incoming вҶ’ C(18,2) = 153
- РҫСҖРҪРёСӮРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ: ~13 incoming вҶ’ C(13,2) = 78

Many of these candidate pairs are already dedup'd against R5-derived shared-IsA pairs (since domain children often share taxonomic parents), so R11's net contribution is the **cross-cluster pairs** that aren't reachable via IsA alone.

### Implementation

`rule_r11_in_domain_shared_target` in `reasoner.rs` вҖ” ~40-line body, structurally identical to R5 but scans incoming InDomain edges. Guards:

- **Tautology**: A = B rejected (canonical pair after sort).
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R11_in_domain_shared_target"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Test coverage

5 new regression tests:

- `r11_derives_related_to_from_shared_domain` вҖ” basic 2-child hub (ТӣРҫСҒСғ/РұУ©Р»Сғ InDomain РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР°).
- `r11_respects_tautology_guard` вҖ” duplicate InDomain facts produce no self-related.
- `r11_does_not_fire_for_distinct_domains` вҖ” A InDomain X + B InDomain Y produces nothing.
- `r11_produces_canonical_pair_once` вҖ” C(3,2) = 3 unique canonical pairs.
- `r11_chains_through_r10_derived_in_domain` вҖ” confirms R11 fires on R10-derived InDomain at fixpoint iter 2.

### Measured delta on T4_200k full re-extract + reasoner

| | v4.0.16 | v4.0.18 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 715 | **13 673** | **вҲ’42** (v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised) |
| text `does_to` | 9 002 | **8 987** | вҲ’15 |
| text `goes_to` | 1 544 | **1 537** | вҲ’7 |
| text `lives_in` | 288 | **280** | вҲ’8 |
| text `has` | 230 | **224** | вҲ’6 |
| text `after` | 219 | **218** | вҲ’1 |
| **derivations total** | 15 832 | **15 973** | **+141 (+0.89 %)** |
| R2 has_inheritance | 454 | **450** | вҲ’4 (dedup cascade from fewer base has) |
| R7 goes_to_via_part_of | 374 | **373** | вҲ’1 |
| **R11 in_domain_shared_target** | вҖ” | **146** | **new** |
| R1 / R3 / R5 / R6 / R8 / R9 / R10 | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 456 | **3 452** | вҲ’4 |
| Graph edges | 12 368 | **12 325** | вҲ’43 |

### v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised

Full re-extract applied v4.0.17's `is_closed_class` fragment expansion (Р¶Р°Р»Рҝ, РјТұРҪ, Р°СҒСӮР°, С…С–С…) вҖ” net **вҲ’42 text-extracted facts** across 5 predicates, confirming v4.0.17's predicted "~32 facts cleaned" was accurate (slight under-prediction due to cascade through other matchers sharing the is_closed_class filter).

### R11 measured 146 net derivations

Pre-rule audit on v4.0.14 predicted R10+R11 stack would produce hundreds of shared-InDomain pairs. Observed net 146 вҖ” well below the theoretical maximum because **most candidate pairs dedup against R5-derived shared-IsA pairs**. R5 already covers arithmetic/biology/literature sibling relations through shared taxonomic parents (e.g. `ТӣР°СҖТ“Р° IsA ТӣТұСҒ + Р°ТӣТӣСғ IsA ТӣТұСҒ` вҹ№ R5 produces `ТӣР°СҖТ“Р° RelatedTo Р°ТӣТӣСғ` before R11 can). R11's unique contribution is the **cross-cluster pairs** вҖ” concepts sharing a domain but NOT a direct IsA parent (e.g. `РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР°` InDomain-children that aren't IsA-siblings: СҒР°РҪ vs ТӣРҫСҒСғ vs РөСҒРөРҝ вҖ” each under different IsA parents but same domain).

### Tests

**484 passing** (+5 R11 regression from v4.0.17).

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.18 (12 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.18 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | **10** | +3 (R9, R10, R11) |
| World Core domains | 14 | **26** | +12 |

| facts.json total | 13 745 | **13 673** | **вҲ’72** (cleaner via 2 noise audits) |

| Tests | 463 | **484** | +21 |

**2Г— derivations crossed cleanly** (+103.1 % cumulative) with **вҲ’72 base facts** вҖ” higher precision, higher derivation density. The v4.0.x direction (knowledge-first + math-driven reasoning) is compounding as designed.

## [4.0.17] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Fragment roots in `is_closed_class` (code-only micro-patch)

Follow-up to v4.0.16's noise audit. While cleaning location-root GoesTo subjects, the audit also surfaced 4 fragment / tokenisation-artefact roots contaminating text-extracted facts:

| root | Г— | origin |
|---|---:|---|
| `Р¶Р°Р»Рҝ` | 12 | fragment of В«Р¶Р°Р»РҝСӢВ» (generally) вҖ” FST over-segments before СӮРҫТӣСӢ-reduction rule |
| `РјТұРҪ` | 8 | demonstrative stem fragment (В«РјТұРҪСӢВ» / В«РјТұРҪРҙР°В» stripped to stem) |
| `Р°СҒСӮР°` | 7 | fragment of В«Р°СҒСӮР°РјВ» (more than) |
| `С…С–С…` | 5 | tokenised Roman numeral XIX |

v4.0.6 already blocked 3 fragment roots (`Р¶Р°СҖСӮ`, `Р°СҖР°СҒСӢРҪРҙР°Т“`, `СӮР°Т“СӢ`); v4.0.17 extends the same blocklist pattern to these 4. Total combined: ~32 base facts will be filtered on the next full re-extract.

### Code change

4-line extension to the `is_closed_class` match + 1 new regression test. Regression test also asserts non-collision with legitimate neighbours: В«Р¶Р°Р»РҝСӢВ» (full form), В«Р°СҒСӮР°РҪР°В» (city-root вҖ” must not collide with fragment В«Р°СҒСӮР°В»), В«РјТұРҪРҙР°В» (full locative).

### Delivery discipline: code-only, no re-extract

v4.0.16 consumed a 26-minute full T4_200k re-extract to materialise its location-root fix. This patch is small enough (~32 expected base-fact reductions) that a dedicated re-extract is wasteful. **Committed `facts.json` retains the ~32 fragment facts until the next full re-extract** вҖ” planned for v4.0.18 along with a new reasoning rule that'll also benefit from the cleaner base.

### Tests

**479 passing** (+1 regression `is_closed_class_covers_v4_0_17_fragments` from v4.0.16).

### Scope

One concern: expand `is_closed_class` with 4 fragments. No data changes, no other code changes.

## [4.0.16] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Noise audit #2: location-root subjects in `dative_goes_to` + `agent_verb`

Second noise-elimination audit of v4.0.x. Audit on fresh v4.0.15 derived_facts.json surfaced a major contamination class: **R7 GoesTo-via-PartOf had 385 of 388 derivations either fully text-only or mixed** вҖ” traced back to text-extracted GoesTo base facts with country / city subjects.

### Audit findings

R7 provenance breakdown on v4.0.15 (388 derivations):

| provenance | count | share |
|---|---:|---:|
| fully world_core | 3 | 0.8 % |
| mixed | 338 | 87.1 % |
| fully text-only | 47 | 12.1 % |

**R7 is the most text-dependent rule in the reasoner** вҖ” it needs both a GoesTo base and a PartOf base, and GoesTo is predominantly text-extracted.

Top text-extracted GoesTo subjects (all producing R7 cascade noise):

| root | Г— | kind |
|---|---:|---|
| ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ | 52 | ethnic noun / proper noun (homograph) |
| Р°РҙР°Рј | 27 | generic subject (metaphorical usage) |
| **ТӣР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ** | **22** | **country вҖ” location, not agent** |
| **Р°Р»РјР°СӮСӢ** | **20** | **city вҖ” location, not agent** |
| **СҲСӢТ“СӢСҒ** | **12** | direction (now curated in directions.jsonl) |
| Р¶Р°Р»Рҝ | 12 | fragment of Р¶Р°Р»РҝСӢ |
| **СҒРҫР»СӮТҜСҒСӮС–Рә** | **8** | direction (now curated) |
| **Р°ТӣСӮУ©РұРө / РҝР°РІР»РҫРҙР°СҖ / Р°СҖР°Р»** | each **7** | **cities** |

Bolded rows total **~80 base facts** that are clearly locations appearing as kinetic-verb subjects вҖ” from Wikipedia biographical patterns like В«РһТЈСӮТҜСҒСӮС–Рә ТҡР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ РҫРұР»СӢСҒСӢРҪРҙР° РҙТҜРҪРёРөРіРө РәРөР»РҙС–В» ("was born in South Kazakhstan oblast") that the extractor takes as `ТӣР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ goes_to РҙТҜРҪРёРө`.

### Root cause (consistent with v4.0.10's pattern)

Four matchers produce predicates whose subjects should not be location nouns (`LivesIn`, `GoesTo`, `DoesTo`):

- `locative_lives_in` вң“ (has `is_location_root` guard since v3.8.5)
- `dative_goes_to` вң— **missing the guard**
- `agent_verb` (DoesTo) вң— **missing the guard**
- `copula_is_a` вҖ” N/A (IsA can legitimately have location subjects like `Р¶РөСҖ IsA Т“Р°Р»Р°РјСҲР°СҖ`)

v3.8.5 hardening identified location nouns as a noise class for `locative_lives_in` but didn't extend to the kinetic verb matchers вҖ” the same oversight pattern that v4.0.10 fixed for `is_time_noun` on `copula_is_a`.

### Fix вҖ” one concern

Added `is_location_root(&root.root)` guard after the existing `is_time_noun` / < 3-char filter in both:

1. **`dative_goes_to`** subject (line ~567 in patterns.rs)
2. **`agent_verb`** subject (line ~995 in patterns.rs)

Plus 2 new regression tests:

- `dative_goes_to_rejects_location_subject` вҖ” 3 Wikipedia-style cases (ТҡР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ, РҗР»РјР°СӮСӢ, РҗТӣСӮУ©РұРө).
- `agent_verb_rejects_location_subject` вҖ” 2 Wikipedia-style cases (ТҡР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ, Р РөСҒРөР№).

### Measured delta (full re-extract T4_200k + reasoner)

| | v4.0.15 | v4.0.16 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 925 | **13 715** | **вҲ’210** |
| text-extracted `does_to` | ~9 171 | **9 002** | **вҲ’169** (agent_verb location-subject guard) |
| text-extracted `goes_to` | ~1 590 | **1 544** | **вҲ’46** (dative_goes_to location-subject guard) |
| **derivations total** | 15 846 | **15 832** | вҲ’14 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 388 | **374** | **вҲ’14** (primary R-rule target) |
| R1-R6, R8-R10 | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 461 | **3 456** | вҲ’5 |
| Graph edges | 12 495 | **12 368** | **вҲ’127** |
| R7 provenance split | 3 WC / 338 mixed / 47 text | 3 WC / 326 mixed / 45 text | mixed вҲ’12, text вҲ’2 |

**Noise-leverage discrepancy vs v4.0.10**: v4.0.10's `copula_is_a` time-noun guard produced **5.7 derivations eliminated per base fact** (63 base вҶ’ 357 deriv). v4.0.16 produces only **0.065 deriv/base** (215 base вҶ’ 14 deriv). Reason: location-subject `goes_to` / `does_to` base facts rarely fed R7 chains because their destinations (РҙТҜРҪРёРө, ТӣР°Т“Р°Р·, У©СҒРөРә, РәУ©ТЈС–Р», etc. вҖ” Wikipedia biographical metonymy) lacked matching `part_of` targets in the graph. The primary win here is **direct base-fact precision** вҖ” 215 categorically wrong text extractions ("ТҡР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ РҙТҜРҪРёРөРіРө РәРөР»РҙС–" вҶ’ `ТӣР°Р·Р°ТӣСҒСӮР°РҪ goes_to РҙТҜРҪРёРө`) removed вҖ” not rule cascade reduction.

### Tests

**478 passing** (+2 regression tests from v4.0.15).

### Not in scope (queued)

- **В«ТӣР°Р·Р°ТӣВ» Г— 52** text GoesTo вҖ” ethnic-noun / homograph polysemy (Qazaq city in Azerbaijan). Same class as v4.0.10's В«Р°РұР°Р№ IsA Р°СғСӢР»В» deferral вҖ” needs dialog-layer sense disambiguation, not extractor guard.
- **Fragment roots** В«Р¶Р°Р»Рҝ / РјТұРҪ / Р°СҒСӮР° / С…С–С…В» Г— 35 combined вҖ” v4.0.6 closed-class expansion pattern; one-concern discipline defers to a future patch.
- **В«Р°РҙР°РјВ» Г— 27**, **В«РұР°Р»Р°В» Г— 15** вҖ” generic human subjects; often legitimate ("person goes to work"). Semantic filtering needed, not a blanket guard.

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.16 (10 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.16 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | 9 | +2 (R9, R10) |
| World Core domains | 14 | **26** | +12 |
| World Core entries | 549 | **792** | +243 |
| facts.json total | 13 745 | **13 715** | **вҲ’30** (cleaner after v4.0.10 / v4.0.16 noise fixes) |
| Derivations | 7 866 | **15 832** | **+7 966 (+101.3 %)** |
| Tests | 463 | **478** | +15 |

v4.0.x has now accumulated **two noise-elimination milestones** (v4.0.10 time-nouns in `copula_is_a`, v4.0.16 location-nouns in `dative_goes_to` + `agent_verb`) вҖ” both closing 2-year-old oversights where v3.8.5 hardening extended a guard to some matchers but missed others.

## [4.0.15] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” World Core batch #4: `language_features.jsonl` + `cooking_methods.jsonl` + `directions.jsonl`

Fourth data batch. Three more curated domains, chosen to exploit R9 (PartOf-transitivity, v4.0.13) and R10 (InDomain-inheritance, v4.0.14) by feeding them long part_of chains and populous IsA taxonomies.

### Three new domains

1. **`language_features.jsonl`** (18 entries) вҖ” linguistic structure. 5-hop part_of backbone: `РҙСӢРұСӢСҒ вҶ’ РұСғСӢРҪ вҶ’ СҒУ©Р· вҶ’ СҒУ©Р№Р»РөРј вҶ’ РјУҷСӮС–РҪ вҶ’ СӮС–Р»`. Sub-chains: `УҷСҖС–Рҝ part_of Р¶Р°Р·Сғ part_of СӮС–Р»`, `РјР°Т“СӢРҪР° part_of СҒУ©Р·`. Sound types: `РҙР°СғСӢСҒСӮСӢ / РҙР°СғСӢСҒСҒСӢР· IsA РҙСӢРұСӢСҒ` (vowels/consonants). Action verbs: `СҒУ©Р№Р»РөСғ / Р¶Р°Р·Сғ IsA УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ`. 4 РұРөР»РіС– children: `РұСғСӢРҪ / УҷСҖС–Рҝ / СҒУ©Р№Р»РөРј` IsA РұРөР»РіС–.

2. **`cooking_methods.jsonl`** (10 entries) вҖ” cooking verbs. `РҝС–СҒС–СҖСғ IsA УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ` hub + 3 РҝС–СҒС–СҖСғ children (`ТӣСғСӢСҖСғ / ТӣР°Р№РҪР°СӮСғ / ТӣР°ТӣСӮР°Сғ`). 6 more УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ siblings: СӮТұР·РҙР°Сғ / Р°СҲСӢСӮСғ / СӮСғСҖР°Сғ / Р°СҖР°Р»Р°СҒСӮСӢСҖСғ / РҙР°Р№СӢРҪРҙР°Сғ. `ТӣР°РјСӢСҖ part_of РҪР°РҪ`.

3. **`directions.jsonl`** (9 entries) вҖ” cardinal + spatial orientation. `РұР°Т“СӢСӮ IsA РұРөР»РіС–` hub + 8 direction children: СҲСӢТ“СӢСҒ / РұР°СӮСӢСҒ / СҒРҫР»СӮТҜСҒСӮС–Рә / РҫТЈСӮТҜСҒСӮС–Рә / Р¶РҫТ“Р°СҖСӢ / СӮУ©РјРөРҪ / РҫТЈ / СҒРҫР».

### Totals

|---|---:|---:|---|

| facts.json total | 13 888 | **13 925** | +37 |
| **derivations total** | 15 135 | **15 846** | **+711 (+4.7 %)** |
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 473 | **484** | +11 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 454 | 454 | 0 |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 43 | **51** | +8 |

| Graph nodes | 3 432 | **3 461** | +29 |

### R9 cascade payoff

The 5-hop `language_features` part_of chain (РҙСӢРұСӢСҒ вҶ’ РұСғСӢРҪ вҶ’ СҒУ©Р· вҶ’ СҒУ©Р№Р»РөРј вҶ’ РјУҷСӮС–РҪ вҶ’ СӮС–Р») is exactly the kind of long mereological chain v4.0.13's R9 was designed for. R9 jumps from 117 вҶ’ **170 (+53)** вҖ” 10 new part_of entries produce **+5.3 R9 derivations per entry**. Plus cross-activation: R3/R6/R7 each gained ~8 derivations from R9's new part_of facts.

### R5 leverage

+623 R5 pairs from dense hubs: 8 new РұР°Т“СӢСӮ children (C(8,2) = 28), 3 new РҝС–СҒС–СҖСғ children + 5 siblings under УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ, 4 РҪРҫРІСӢС… РұРөР»РіС– children cross-chain with existing (СҒР°РҪ, Р°ТӣСҲР°, СӮС–Р», РҙСӢРұСӢСҒ, РұСғСӢРҪ, УҷСҖС–Рҝ, СҒУ©Р№Р»РөРј now all IsA РұРөР»РіС–, giving C(n,2) combinatorics).

### Effective leverage: +19.2 derivations per curated fact

**711 new derivations / 37 new curated facts = +19.2 derivations/fact.** Roughly matches v4.0.12's +19/fact baseline for multi-hub batches. Below v4.0.9's peak of +47/fact (single huge РјР°РјР°РҪ hub) but consistent вҖ” this was not a concentration batch.

| R5 shared-IsA | 5 940 | **13 414** | **+7 474 (+126 %)** |

**Crossed 2Г— derivations mark** (+101.4 % cumulative) вҖ” the knowledge+rules axis rotation has compounded.

### Scope

Purely additive data. No code changes. 476 tests unchanged.

## [4.0.14] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” R10 InDomain-inheritance via IsA (new reasoning rule)

Second consecutive rule-axis patch. Reasoner roster 8 вҶ’ 9. Pattern: `A IsA B вҲ§ B InDomain D вҹ№ A InDomain D` вҖ” identical shape to R2 (Has-inheritance), applied to the domain-membership predicate.

### Why InDomain-inheritance

InDomain has been the least-activated predicate вҖ” only 24 base facts on v4.0.13 (14 in kz_literature, 4 math-ops, plus biology/anatomy/astronomy/color seeds). Yet IsA taxonomies are dense (587 distinct subjects). An inheritance rule unlocks coverage through existing taxonomy without new curation: every Рұird inheriting РҫСҖРҪРёСӮРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ from `ТӣТұСҒ InDomain РҫСҖРҪРёСӮРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ`, every number inheriting РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР° from `СҒР°РҪ InDomain РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР°`.

### Pre-rule audit on v4.0.13

Direct 1-hop chains available (A IsA B вҲ§ B InDomain D, no trivial skip):

| domain | derivable count |
|---|---:|
| РјР°СӮРөРјР°СӮРёРәР° | 25 |
| Р·РҫРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ | 21 |
| РҫСҖРҪРёСӮРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ | 12 |
| УҷРҙРөРұРёРөСӮ | 4 |
| Р°СҒСӮСҖРҫРҪРҫРјРёСҸ | 3 |
| РәУ©СҖСғ | 1 |
| **total 1-hop** | **66** |

Plus fixpoint chaining through R1-derived IsA facts (e.g. `Р°СҖСӢСҒСӮР°РҪ IsA Р¶СӢСҖСӮТӣСӢСҲ IsA Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ` вҶ’ R1 derives `Р°СҖСӢСҒСӮР°РҪ IsA Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ` вҶ’ R10 derives `Р°СҖСӢСҒСӮР°РҪ InDomain Р·РҫРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ` at iter 2).

### Measured on committed v4.0.13 runtime

| rule | v4.0.13 | v4.0.14 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1-R9 rules | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| **R10_in_domain_inheritance** | вҖ” | **102** | **new** |
| **derivations total** | 14 836 / 15 033 | **15 135** | **+102 (+0.68 %)** |
| Fixpoint passes | 5 | 5 | same |

**102 > 66 predicted** вҖ” the 36-fact delta is R1-transitive chaining at iter 2. When `X IsA Y IsA Z` exists and `Z InDomain D`, R10 fires for both `(X, InDomain, D)` and `(Y, InDomain, D)` after R1 produces the `X IsA Z` shortcut. Classic fixpoint compounding.

### R10 is isolated (no cross-activation)

Unlike R9 which fed into R3/R6/R7 via PartOf, R10 produces InDomain facts that no current rule consumes. Future R11/R12 could extend (e.g. В«A InDomain D1 вҲ§ B InDomain D1 вҹ№ RelatedTo(A, B)В» вҖ” the InDomain analogue of R5 shared-IsA), but that's scope for a later patch.

### Implementation

`rule_r10_in_domain_inheritance` in `reasoner.rs` вҖ” same ~30-line structure as R2 Has-inheritance. Guards:

- **Tautology**: `A = D` rejected (defensive; would mean A categorized into itself via a taxonomy hop).
- **No cross-scale guard**: InDomain is not a scale concept.
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R10_in_domain_inheritance"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Test coverage

5 new regression tests:

- `r10_derives_in_domain_inheritance` вҖ” basic 1-hop (ТӣР°СҒТӣСӢСҖ IsA Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ вҶ’ InDomain Р·РҫРҫР»РҫРіРёСҸ).
- `r10_respects_tautology_guard` вҖ” synthetic A IsA B + B InDomain A rejection.
- `r10_does_not_fire_without_chain` вҖ” isolated InDomain fact alone вҶ’ no derivation.
- `r10_dedupes_against_existing_fact` вҖ” explicit long-arc вҮ’ R10 doesn't duplicate.
- `r10_chains_through_r1_derived_is_a` вҖ” 3-level chain Р°СҖСӢСҒСӮР°РҪ IsA Р¶СӢСҖСӮТӣСӢСҲ IsA Р¶Р°РҪСғР°СҖ, confirms R10 fires on R1-derived IsA at fixpoint iter 2.

### Tests

**476 passing** (+5 R10 regression tests from v4.0.13).

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.14 (8 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.14 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | **9** | +2 (R9, R10) |
| World Core domains | 14 | 23 | +9 |
| World Core entries | 549 | 755 | +206 |
| Derivations | 7 866 | **15 135** | **+7 269 (+92.4 %)** |
| Tests | 463 | **476** | +13 |

### Scope discipline

One new rule, one concern. 5 new tests, ~30 lines of rule body, no data changes.

## [4.0.13] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” R9 PartOf-transitivity (new reasoning rule)

Rule-axis rotation after three consecutive data batches. The reasoner has been at 7 active rules since v4.0.4 (R8 added); v4.0.13 adds the 8th вҖ” **R9 PartOf-transitivity**.

### Why PartOf-transitivity specifically

`PartOf` is a partial order. The transitive closure is **mathematically clean** вҖ” no semantic overreach, unlike `Has`-transitivity which was rejected in v2.x because "car has wheel вҲ§ garage has car вҹ№ garage has wheel" is false. Mereological part-of chains do compose: В«СҲР°СҲ part_of РұР°СҒ вҲ§ РұР°СҒ part_of РҙРөРҪРө вҹ№ СҲР°СҲ part_of РҙРөРҪРөВ» is universally accepted.

### Why the timing makes sense

Three v4.0.x data batches (v4.0.7, v4.0.9, v4.0.11, v4.0.12) populated the `PartOf` base from 117 to 137 facts across plants / house_parts / body_parts / transport / astronomy. Pre-rule audit surfaced **103 ready 2-hop chains** on the committed graph вҖ” enough for R9 to produce meaningful output on day one, unlike the v2.4.0 R1-activation (which fired 0 times until v2.5+ data landed).

### Implementation

New rule in `adam-reasoning/src/reasoner.rs` (~30-line body, same structure as R8). Guards:

- **Tautology**: `A = C` rejected (defensive; well-formed PartOf chains are acyclic).
- **Astronomical cross-scale**: inherited from the R6/R7 pattern вҖ” if target `C` is an astronomical-scale object (`is_astronomical_object`) and subject `A` is not, reject. Prevents future В«Р¶Р°РҝСӢСҖР°Тӣ part_of Р°Т“Р°СҲ part_of ... part_of РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–В» leaks once intermediate forest / ecosystem entries land.
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R9_part_of_transitivity"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Measured delta on committed v4.0.12 runtime

| rule | v4.0.12 | v4.0.13 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 473 | 473 | 0 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 467 | 454 | **вҲ’13** (dedup вҖ” see below) |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 28 | **43** | **+15 (+54 %)** |
| R5_shared_is_a_target | 12 791 | 12 791 | 0 |
| R6_lives_in_via_part_of | 37 | **41** | +4 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 306 | **380** | **+74 (+24 %)** |
| R8_after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| **R9_part_of_transitivity** | вҖ” | **117** | **new** |
| **derivations total** | 14 836 | **15 033** | **+197 (+1.3 %)** |
| Fixpoint passes | 6 | **5** | cleaner convergence |

### Cross-activation, not just direct derivation

The 117 direct R9 derivations are only ~60 % of the net gain. R9 creates new PartOf facts that **R3**, **R6**, **R7** can then chain through вҖ” R7 alone gained +74 derivations (+24 %) as motion-through-parts chains deepened one hop. R3 Has-via-PartOf gained +15 (+54 % on a rule that was previously sparsely activated). This is a **rule-on-rule multiplier** вҖ” the intended effect for a mereological primitive.

The R2 drop (вҲ’13) is dedup: R9's new part_of derivations mean R2 convergence picks up facts at a different iteration, so some Has-inheritance derivations get consolidated earlier. Fixpoint in 5 passes (was 6) confirms cleaner convergence.

### Test coverage

Six new regression tests in `reasoner.rs`:

- `r9_derives_part_of_transitivity` вҖ” basic 2-hop (СҲР°СҲ вҶ’ РұР°СҒ вҶ’ РҙРөРҪРө).
- `r9_respects_tautology_guard` вҖ” synthetic cyclic chain rejection.
- `r9_astronomy_same_scale_allowed` вҖ” Р¶РөСҖ вҶ’ РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС– вҶ’ РіР°Р»Р°РәСӮРёРәР° passes.
- `r9_astronomy_cross_scale_rejected` вҖ” synthetic В«РұР°Р»Р° part_of Р¶РөСҖ part_of РәТҜРҪ Р¶ТҜР№РөСҒС–В» blocked.
- `r9_chains_across_iterations` вҖ” 4-node chain (СӮС–СҒ/Р°СғСӢР·/РұРөСӮ/РұР°СҒ/РҙРөРҪРө) reaches full transitive closure (6 non-adjacent pairs).
- `r9_dedupes_against_existing_fact` вҖ” explicit long-arc in input вҮ’ R9 doesn't re-derive.

### Tests

**471 passing** (+6 R9 regression tests from v4.0.12).

### Noise propagation (honest baseline)

R9 propagates existing noise in the PartOf base вҖ” e.g. В«СӮРөТЈС–Р· part_of У©СҒС–РјРҙС–Рә part_of РәУ©РәУ©РҪС–СҒВ» (text-extraction chain, semantically absurd) will produce В«СӮРөТЈС–Р· part_of РәУ©РәУ©РҪС–СҒВ» as a derivation. This is **the same invariant all rules carry**: the reasoner doesn't validate base-fact semantics. The `derivation_is_fully_curated` helper (v4.0.3) remains the recommended filter for investor-safe surfaces.

| R5 shared-IsA | 5 940 | 12 791 | +6 851 |
| Workspace tests | 463 | **471** | +8 |

### Scope discipline

One new rule, one concern. 6 new tests, 30 lines of rule body, no other code changes, no data changes.

## [4.0.12] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” World Core batch #3: `emotions.jsonl` + `weather_phenomena.jsonl` + `materials.jsonl`

Third fast-path batch. Three new curated domains, ~3 s pipeline rebuild. **Plan substitution**: `drinks.jsonl` (originally queued) dropped after pre-batch audit вҖ” `food.jsonl` already covers the `СҒСғСҒСӢРҪ` hub (СҲР°Р№, СҒСғ IsA СҒСғСҒСӢРҪ) and the core milk derivatives (СҒТҜСӮ / ТӣСӢРјСӢР· / СҲТұРұР°СӮ / Р°Р№СҖР°РҪ as IsA СӮР°Т“Р°Рј). Substituted with `materials.jsonl` вҖ” genuine gap (СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ hub had zero world_core coverage).

### New domains

1. **`emotions.jsonl`** (18 entries) вҖ” abstract-concept domain. Opens with `Р°РҙР°Рј has СҒРөР·С–Рј` (activates R2 Has-inheritance through `X IsA Р°РҙР°Рј` chains). 17 emotion types IsA СҒРөР·С–Рј: ТӣСғР°РҪСӢСҲ, ТӣР°Р№Т“СӢ, Р°СҲСғ, РјР°С…Р°РұРұР°СӮ, ТӣРҫСҖТӣСӢРҪСӢСҲ, СӮР°ТЈРҙР°РҪСӢСҒ, ТҜРјС–СӮ, У©РәС–РҪС–СҲ, РјР°ТӣСӮР°РҪСӢСҲ, ТұСҸСӮ, СӢР·Р°, СҒР°Т“СӢРҪСӢСҲ, РјРөР№С–СҖС–Рј, СҒРөРҪС–Рј, СҖРёР·Р°СҲСӢР»СӢТӣ, СҖРөРҪС–СҲ, РұР°ТӣСӢСӮ. Pure native Kazakh, no loanwords (СҚРјРҫСҶРёСҸ / РҝСҒРёС…РёРәР° / СҒСӮСҖРөСҒСҒ all skipped).

2. **`weather_phenomena.jsonl`** (15 entries) вҖ” natural phenomena under existing `ТӣТұРұСӢР»СӢСҒ` hub (was used by `bio_039: СӮС–СҖСҲС–Р»С–Рә IsA ТӣТұРұСӢР»СӢСҒ` and `color_029: РәРөРјРҝС–СҖТӣРҫСҒР°Тӣ IsA ТӣТұРұСӢР»СӢСҒ`). Adds 15 atmospheric + seismic phenomena: Р¶Р°ТЈРұСӢСҖ, ТӣР°СҖ, РұТұСҖСҲР°Тӣ, СӮТұРјР°РҪ, СҲСӢТӣ, Р¶РөР», РұРҫСҖР°РҪ, РҙР°СғСӢР», РҪР°Р№Р·Р°Т“Р°Р№, СҒРөР», Р·С–Р»Р·Р°Р»Р°, ТӣСғР°ТЈ, ТӣСӢСҖР°Сғ, Р°СҸР·, РұТұР»СӮ. РҡРөРјРҝС–СҖТӣРҫСҒР°Тӣ deliberately NOT duplicated (already in colors.jsonl).

3. **`materials.jsonl`** (14 entries) вҖ” new `СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ IsA Р·Р°СӮ` hub with 13 material children. Metals (СӮРөРјС–СҖ, РјСӢСҒ, Р°Р»СӮСӢРҪ, РәТҜРјС–СҒ, ТӣРҫСҖТ“Р°СҒСӢРҪ, СҲРҫР№СӢРҪ, РұРҫР»Р°СӮ), minerals (СӮР°СҒ, СҒР°Р·), organic materials (ТӣР°Р№СӢСҒ, СӮРөСҖС–, РјР°СӮР°, Р¶С–Рҝ). Cross-chain designed-in: `РјР°СӮР° IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ` in this batch + existing `Р¶ТҜРҪ / РјР°ТӣСӮР° / Р¶С–РұРөРә IsA РјР°СӮР°` from `clothing.jsonl` вҶ’ R1 transitivity produces В«Р¶ТҜРҪ IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮВ» etc. without explicit statement.

### Totals

|---|---:|---:|---|
| World Core domains | 20 | **23** | +3 |
| World Core entries | 708 | **755** | +47 |
| World Core facts | 802 | **849** | +47 |

| extracted (Grammar, unchanged) | 13 039 | 13 039 | 0 |

| R1_is_a_transitivity | 452 | **473** | +21 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 446 | **467** | +21 |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 28 | 28 | 0 |
| **R5_shared_is_a_target** | 11 940 | **12 791** | **+851** |
| R6_lives_in_via_part_of | 37 | 37 | 0 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 306 | 306 | 0 |
| R8_after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 407 | **3 432** | +25 |
| Graph edges | 12 448 | **12 495** | +47 |

### Effective leverage: +19 derivations per added curated fact

Below v4.0.11's +27/fact and v4.0.9's peak of +47/fact. Explanation: this batch adds **three small isolated hubs** (СҒРөР·С–Рј with 17 children, СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ with 13, + 15 new ТӣТұРұСӢР»СӢСҒ children) rather than **one large cross-chain** into the existing РјР°РјР°РҪ hub. R5 shared-IsA leverage scales as C(n,2) within a hub вҖ” 17-child СҒРөР·С–Рј gives C(17,2) = 136 pairs; 13-child СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ gives 78; 15 РҪРҫРІСӢС… ТӣТұРұСӢР»СӢСҒ children + 2 pre-existing (СӮС–СҖСҲС–Р»С–Рә, РәРөРјРҝС–СҖТӣРҫСҒР°Тӣ) = 17 total, giving C(17,2) = 136 pairs of which ~15Г—2 = 30 are new from this batch. Total new R5: roughly 136 + 78 + 30 + cross-hub trickles + R1/R2 cascades вүҲ 851 вҖ” matches observed.

### R2 activation via В«Р°РҙР°Рј has СҒРөР·С–РјВ»

New fact `Р°РҙР°Рј has СҒРөР·С–Рј` triggers R2 Has-inheritance for every curated `X IsA Р°РҙР°Рј` chain. Current state has few direct `IsA Р°РҙР°Рј` entries; leverage will compound as future batches add human-category children.

### Cross-domain cross-chain designed-in

- `РјР°СӮР° IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ` (materials) + existing `Р¶ТҜРҪ / РјР°ТӣСӮР° / Р¶С–РұРөРә IsA РјР°СӮР°` (clothing) вҶ’ R1 transitive `Р¶ТҜРҪ IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ`, `РјР°ТӣСӮР° IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ`, `Р¶С–РұРөРә IsA СҲРёРәС–Р·Р°СӮ` emerge without explicit statement.
- `Р°РҙР°Рј has СҒРөР·С–Рј` (emotions) + future `Р°РҙР°Рј IsA X` entries will produce R2 `X has СҒРөР·С–Рј` inheritance.

### Pipeline cost

Full rebuild: ~3 s. Pre-v4.0.8 equivalent: ~135 min = **~2 700Г— speedup** on 3-domain batch.

### Cumulative v4.0.7 вҶ’ v4.0.12 (6 releases)

| | v4.0.7 | v4.0.12 | cumulative delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| World Core domains | 14 | **23** | +9 (+64 %) |
| World Core entries | 549 | **755** | +206 (+37.5 %) |
| World Core facts | 643 | **849** | +206 (+32.0 %) |
| Derivations | 7 866 | **14 836** | **+6 970 (+88.6 %)** |
| R5 shared-IsA | 5 940 | **12 791** | **+6 851 (+115 %)** |
| Graph nodes / edges | 3 315 / 12 350 | 3 432 / 12 495 | +117 / +145 |
| Pipeline cost per data patch | ~45 min | **~3 s** | ~900Г— faster |

### Scope

Purely additive data. No code changes. 465 tests unchanged.

## [4.0.11] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” World Core batch #2: `music_kz.jsonl` + `sports.jsonl` + `house_parts.jsonl`

Second fast-path batch. Three new curated domains completing v4.0.9's rhythm: +54 entries, ~3 seconds pipeline rebuild.

### New domains

1. **`music_kz.jsonl`** (16 entries) вҖ” Kazakh traditional music. New `Р°СҒРҝР°Рҝ` hub (Р°СҒРҝР°Рҝ IsA ТӣТұСҖР°Р») with 10 instrument children: РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР°, ТӣРҫРұСӢР·, СҒСӢРұСӢР·Т“СӢ, Р¶РөСӮС–РіРөРҪ, СҲР°ТЈТӣРҫРұСӢР·, РҙР°РұСӢР», РҙР°СғСӢР»РҝР°Р·, Р°СҒР°СӮР°СҸТӣ, СҒСӢСҖРҪР°Р№, СҒР°Р·СҒСӢСҖРҪР°Р№. 3 performer professions (РҙРҫРјРұСӢСҖР°СҲСӢ, ТӣРҫРұСӢР·СҲСӢ, СҒСӢРұСӢР·Т“СӢСҲСӢ IsA РјР°РјР°РҪ). 2 cultural events: Р°Р№СӮСӢСҒ IsA Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ (song-contest; cross-chains into the new sports.Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ hub), СӮРҫР№ IsA Р¶РёСӢРҪ. Forms (УҷРҪ, РәТҜР№, Р¶СӢСҖ, СӮРөСҖРјРө, СӮРҫР»Т“Р°Сғ) deferred вҖ” Р¶СӢСҖ already in kz_literature as IsA Р¶Р°РҪСҖ and a cleaner musical-composition hub decision is pending.

2. **`sports.jsonl`** (18 entries) вҖ” traditional Kazakh games + general athletics. Hub chain: `РҫР№СӢРҪ IsA УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ`, `Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ IsA РҫР№СӢРҪ`. Contest children under Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ: РәУ©РәРҝР°СҖ, Р°СғРҙР°СҖСӢСҒРҝР°Тӣ, СҒР°Р№СӢСҒ, РұУҷР№РіРө, РәТҜСҖРөСҒ (5 national horseback / wrestling traditions). Game children under РҫР№СӢРҪ: Р°Р»СӮСӢРұР°ТӣР°РҪ, Р°СҒСӢТӣ, СӮРҫТ“СӢР·ТӣТұРјР°Р»Р°Тӣ (3 national). Equipment: РҙРҫРҝ IsA ТӣТұСҖР°Р». Athlete professions (6): СҲР°РұР°РҪРҙРҫР·, РҝР°Р»СғР°РҪ, РјРөСҖРіРөРҪ, Р¶ТҜРіС–СҖСғСҲС–, Р¶ТҜР·РіС–СҲ (IsA РјР°РјР°РҪ). Misc: Р¶Р°СӮСӮСӢТ“Сғ IsA УҷСҖРөРәРөСӮ, Р¶РөТЈС–СҒ part_of Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ. Loanwords (С„СғСӮРұРҫР», С…РҫРәРәРөР№, РұРҫРәСҒ, СӮСҖРөРҪРөСҖ) excluded per corpus purity directive.

3. **`house_parts.jsonl`** (20 entries) вҖ” architectural parts + furniture. `ТҜР№ has РұУ©Р»РјРө` opens the hub (activates R3 Has-via-PartOf inheritance through all 11 part_of entries). Parts part_of ТҜР№: РұУ©Р»РјРө, РөСҒС–Рә, СӮРөСҖРөР·Рө, РөРҙРөРҪ, СӮУ©РұРө, ТӣР°РұСӢСҖТ“Р°, РұР°СҒРҝР°Р»РҙР°Тӣ, СҲР°СӮСӢСҖ, РҙУҷР»С–Р·, РјТұСҖР¶Р°, РҝРөСҲ, Р¶РёТ»Р°Р·, РәС–Р»РөРј. Furniture sub-hub: Р¶РёТ»Р°Р· part_of ТҜР№, then 5 IsA Р¶РёТ»Р°Р· children (ТҜСҒСӮРөР», РҫСҖСӢРҪРҙСӢТӣ, СӮУ©СҒРөРә, СҒР°РҪРҙСӢТӣ, СҒУ©СҖРө). РҝУҷСӮРөСҖ IsA ТҜР№ (apartment-as-house).

### Totals

| | v4.0.10 | v4.0.11 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| World Core domains | 17 | **20** | +3 |
| World Core entries | 654 | **708** | +54 |
| World Core facts | 748 | **802** | +54 |

### Measured runtime delta (fast-path rebuild)

| | v4.0.10 | v4.0.11 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 787 | **13 841** | +54 |
| curated (HumanApproved) | 748 | **802** | +54 |
| extracted (Grammar, unchanged) | 13 039 | 13 039 | 0 |
| **derivations total** | **12 492** | **13 943** | **+1 451 (+11.6 %)** |
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 426 | **452** | +26 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 436 | **446** | +10 |
| **R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of** | 26 | **28** | **+2** (house_parts activates) |

### Effective leverage: +27 derivations per added curated fact

**1 451 new derivations / 54 new curated facts = +27 derivations/fact.** Below v4.0.9's peak (+47/fact, which had a single 40-entry professions.jsonl saturating the РјР°РјР°РҪ hub), above v4.0.7's +13/fact baseline. The 10 new Р°СҒРҝР°Рҝ children (C(10,2)=45 R5 pairs on a new hub) + 6 new athlete professions (extending the ~55-child РјР°РјР°РҪ hub to ~61, adding ~55Г—6 = 330 new R5 pairs with existing children) account for the majority of the R5 gain.

### Cross-domain cross-chain

Explicit designed cross-links in this batch:
- `Р°Р№СӮСӢСҒ IsA Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ` (music_kz вҶ’ sports) вҖ” Р°Р№СӮСӢСҒ becomes R5-related to every other Р¶Р°СҖСӢСҒ child (РәУ©РәРҝР°СҖ, Р°СғРҙР°СҖСӢСҒРҝР°Тӣ, РұУҷР№РіРө, РәТҜСҖРөСҒ, СҒР°Р№СӢСҒ).
- `РәТҜР№СҲС– / Р¶СӢСҖСҲСӢ` (already in professions) вҖ” now cross-chain with the instrument domain through their IsA РјР°РјР°РҪ shared parent.
- `РҝРөСҲ part_of ТҜР№` (house_parts) вҖ” activates new R3 chain: when future entries add `РҝРөСҲ has Р¶СӢР»Сғ` or `ТҜР№ has РҝРөСҲ` inheritance, R3 will populate.

### Pipeline cost

v4.0.11 full rebuild: ~3 seconds (3-domain batch confirms v4.0.8 infra). Pre-v4.0.8 equivalent: ~135 min per-domain workflow вҶ’ batch in one: **~2 700Г— speedup**.

### Scope discipline

Purely additive data. No code changes. 465 tests unchanged.

**Substituted from original plan**: v4.0.10 closing mentioned `music_kz / sports / education` as v4.0.11 candidates. Pre-batch audit surfaced that `education` is already 70 % covered across `society.jsonl` (РјРөРәСӮРөРҝ, СғРҪРёРІРөСҖСҒРёСӮРөСӮ, РұС–Р»С–Рј, РҫТӣСғСҲСӢ, СҒСӮСғРҙРөРҪСӮ, Т“СӢР»СӢРј), `professions.jsonl` (РјТұТ“Р°Р»С–Рј, РҫТӣСӢСӮСғСҲСӢ, СӮУҷСҖРұРёРөСҲС–), `tools_household.jsonl` (ТӣР°Р»Р°Рј, ТӣР°СҖСӢРҪРҙР°СҲ, РҙУҷРҝСӮРөСҖ), and `kz_literature.jsonl` (Р°Т“Р°СҖСӮСғСҲСӢ). A dedicated education.jsonl would duplicate ~10 of 15 core entries. Substituted with `house_parts.jsonl` вҖ” genuine gap (ТҜР№ / РұУ©Р»РјРө / Р¶РёТ»Р°Р· had zero world_core coverage pre-v4.0.11).

## [4.0.10] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” Noise-elimination audit: time-noun subjects in `copula_is_a`

Audit on the fresh v4.0.9 `derived_facts.json` (12 849 derivations) surfaced one dominant text-only noise class that had persisted through v4.0.x: Wikipedia timeline entries extracted as IsA facts with month / day / year subjects.

### Audit findings

R5 provenance breakdown on v4.0.9 (10 827 shared-IsA derivations):

| provenance | count | share |
|---|---:|---:|
| both sources world_core | 9 293 | 85.8 % |
| mixed (1 world_core + 1 text) | 1 421 | 13.1 % |
| both sources text | 113 | 1.0 % |

**R5 is already safe.** 85.8 % fully curated; the mixed path is filtered by `derivation_is_fully_curated` in the dialog layer (v4.0.2 / v4.0.3).

**R1 is_a-transitivity** told a different story вҖ” 19 of 449 derivations were **fully text-only**. Inspecting those, every single one traced back to one of three noise classes:

1. **Month-name subjects from Wikipedia timelines** вҖ” "8 ТӣР°ТЈСӮР°СҖ вҖ” РҗТӣСӮУ©РұРөРҙРө РҡРөТЈРөСҒ У©РәС–РјРөСӮС– РҫСҖРҪР°РҙСӢ" вҶ’ `ТӣР°ТЈСӮР°СҖ IsA У©РәС–РјРөСӮС–`. Classes: `ТӣР°ТЈСӮР°СҖГ—4`, `Р°ТӣРҝР°РҪГ—1`, `СҒУҷСғС–СҖГ—2`, `ТӣСӢСҖРәТҜР№РөРәГ—1`, `ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪГ—3`, `Р¶РөР»СӮРҫТӣСҒР°РҪГ—2` вҖ” 13 base IsA facts.
2. **Year subject `Р¶СӢР»`** вҖ” "1791 Р¶СӢР» вҖ” Р—СӢСҖСҸРҪ РәРөРҪС–СҲСӮРөСҖС– Р¶ТұРјСӢСҒСӢРҪСӢТЈ РұР°СҒСӮР°Р»СғСӢ" вҶ’ `Р¶СӢР» IsA Р¶ТұРјСӢСҒСӢРҪ`. 15+ base facts from date-prefixed timeline entries.
3. **Month-to-month ranges in parens** вҖ” "(ТӣСӢСҖРәТҜР№РөРә 1955 вҖ” СҒУҷСғС–СҖ 1963) Р‘РҫРұРёСҖ Рқ." вҶ’ `ТӣСӢСҖРәТҜР№РөРә IsA СҒУҷСғС–СҖ`, `СҒУҷСғС–СҖ IsA ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ`, etc.

### Root cause

Of the four v2.x-era IsA-producing matchers (`copula_is_a`, `locative_lives_in`, `dative_goes_to`, `agent_verb`), three already applied an `is_time_noun` subject guard. **`copula_is_a` did not.** It was the only matcher whose subject path went through `resolve_bare_noun` without any time-noun filter. Every other matcher had the guard added in v3.8.5 when time nouns were identified as a noise class for `LivesIn`/`GoesTo`/`DoesTo`; the `copula_is_a` oversight was missed.

### Fix вҖ” one-concern patch

1. **Expanded `is_time_noun`** with 19 new entries вҖ” 12 months (ТӣР°ТЈСӮР°СҖ, Р°ТӣРҝР°РҪ, РҪР°СғСҖСӢР·, СҒУҷСғС–СҖ, РјР°РјСӢСҖ, РјР°СғСҒСӢРј, СҲС–Р»РҙРө, СӮР°РјСӢР·, ТӣСӢСҖРәТҜР№РөРә, ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ, ТӣР°СҖР°СҲР°, Р¶РөР»СӮРҫТӣСҒР°РҪ) + 7 days (РҙТҜР№СҒРөРҪРұС–, СҒРөР№СҒРөРҪРұС–, СҒУҷСҖСҒРөРҪРұС–, РұРөР№СҒРөРҪРұС–, Р¶ТұРјР°, СҒРөРҪРұС–, Р¶РөРәСҒРөРҪРұС–). Seasons deliberately excluded: РәУ©РәСӮРөРј / Р¶Р°Р· / РәТҜР· / ТӣСӢСҒ are curated in world_core.time.jsonl as legitimate IsA subjects (e.g. `Р¶Р°Р· IsA РјРөР·РіС–Р»`) and never appeared as text-extraction noise.
2. **Added `is_time_noun(&subj.root)` guard** to `copula_is_a` after `resolve_bare_noun`.
3. **Two new regression tests**: `is_time_noun_covers_v4_0_10_months_and_days` (31 assertions) and `copula_is_a_refuses_time_noun_subject` (5 Wikipedia-style negative cases).

### Homograph handling

Three of the month names are homographs with other Kazakh words: `ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ` (October / cauldron), `РјР°РјСӢСҖ` (May / peace), `РҪР°СғСҖСӢР·` (March / Nauryz holiday). **World_core curation takes precedence** вҖ” `tool_026: ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ IsA СӢРҙСӢСҒ` is unaffected (world_core loader bypasses pattern matchers). Any text-pack extraction of these homographs as IsA subjects is dropped; the cost is a handful of rare correct extractions in exchange for eliminating an entire noise class.

### Measured delta

Full re-extract on T4_200k (`--bench-order --max-total 200000`), re-run reasoner + graph:

| | v4.0.9 | v4.0.10 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 850 | **13 787** | **вҲ’63** |
| extracted (Grammar) | 13 102 | 13 039 | вҲ’63 |
| curated (HumanApproved) | 748 | 748 | 0 |
| `is_a` facts | 659 | **623** | **вҲ’36** (primary target) |
| `does_to` facts | 9 192 | 9 171 | вҲ’21 |
| `goes_to` facts | 1 597 | 1 590 | вҲ’7 |
| `lives_in` facts | 289 | 288 | вҲ’1 |
| Other predicates | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| **derivations total** | **12 849** | **12 492** | **вҲ’357 (вҲ’2.8 %)** |
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 449 | **426** | вҲ’23 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 474 | **436** | вҲ’38 |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 26 | 26 | 0 |
| **R5_shared_is_a_target** | 10 827 | **10 537** | **вҲ’290** |
| R6_lives_in_via_part_of | 36 | 36 | 0 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 303 | 297 | вҲ’6 |
| R8_after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 375 | 3 374 | вҲ’1 |
| Graph edges | 12 449 | 12 394 | вҲ’55 |

### Bonus multi-matcher propagation

Because `is_time_noun` is also applied in `locative_lives_in`, `dative_goes_to`, and `agent_verb` subject filters, expanding the set with months + days tightened **all four** matchers simultaneously. The v4.0.10 diff-in-one-function produced вҲ’36 IsA (the explicit target) **plus** вҲ’29 across the other three matchers (does_to вҲ’21, goes_to вҲ’7, lives_in вҲ’1) вҖ” 29 "free" precision wins the audit hadn't predicted. Noise leverage: **63 base facts eliminated вҶ’ 357 derivations eliminated = 5.7 derivations per base fact**.

### Visible confirmation

Most-connected content nouns on the graph rotated: v4.0.9 had В«Р¶СӢР» (151)В» in the top-5 вҖ” the January/February/2011 noise that made "year" artificially central. v4.0.10 drops В«Р¶СӢР»В» entirely from the top-5 and promotes В«Р°СӮ (horse, degree 148)В» in its place. The fix is observable in graph-level centrality, not just aggregate counts.

### Tests

**465 passing** (+2 from v4.0.9).

### Scope discipline

One concern: close the last time-noun extractor gap. No new predicates, no new rules, no data changes, no schema changes. The fix is a ~35-line diff in one function.

**Not in scope** for v4.0.10 (queued for future audits):
- **Proper-name homograph noise** вҖ” В«Р°РұР°Р№ IsA Р°СғСӢР»В» (19 times вҖ” there are many villages named Abai), В«ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ IsA ТӣР°Р»Р°В» (city in Azerbaijan). These are factually correct but collide with famous-referent senses (Abai the poet, Kazakh the people). Needs a dialog-layer sense-disambiguation pass, not an extractor guard.
- **Metaphorical proverbs** вҖ” В«Р•ТЈРұРөРә вҖ” СӮР°РұСӢСҒСӮСӢТЈ ТӣР°Р№РҪР°СҖСӢВ» вҶ’ `РөТЈРұРөРә IsA ТӣР°Р№РҪР°СҖ`. FST extraction is structurally correct; the metaphor is lost only at the semantic level. Addressing this would need a metaphor detector (out of scope for patch-size work).

---

## [4.0.9] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” World Core batch: `plants.jsonl` + `professions.jsonl` + `tools_household.jsonl` (first fast-path batch release)

First release to exploit the v4.0.8 fast-path. Three new domains added in one patch; full data pipeline rebuild took <3 seconds instead of ~45 minutes under the old per-domain workflow. At the user's direction ("РҪРөРҫРұС…РҫРҙРёРјРҫ РҙРҫРұР°РІР»СҸСӮСҢ РҫСӮ СӮСҖРөС… РҙРҫ РҝСҸСӮРё, СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РІСҒРө СҒСҖР°Р·Сғ СӮРөСҒСӮРёСҖРҫРІР°СӮСҢ"), this lands the first multi-domain batch вҖ” targeting gap-fill + highest-leverage hubs.

### Three new domains вҖ” rationale per domain

1. **`plants.jsonl`** (35 entries / 35 facts) вҖ” **symmetry gap filler**. The v4.0.6 World Core had `animals.jsonl` (40 entries) but no flora counterpart. Adds `Р°Т“Р°СҲ` children (ТӣР°Р№СӢТЈ, РөРјРөРҪ, СӮРөСҖРөРә, СӮР°Р», ТӣР°СҖР°Т“Р°Р№, СҲСӢСҖСҲР°, Р°СҖСҲР°, ТҜР№РөТЈРәС–, Р¶РёРҙРө), `РіТҜР»` children (СҖР°СғСҲР°РҪ, ТӣСӢР·Т“Р°Р»РҙР°Тӣ, РұУҷР№СҲРөСҲРөРә, Р»Р°Р»Р°, ТӣР°Р»Р°РјРҝСӢСҖ), `РұТұСӮР°` sub-hub (СӮРҫРұСӢР»Т“СӢ, РёСӮРјТұСҖСӢРҪ), `СҲУ©Рҝ` children (Р¶СғСҒР°РҪ, ТӣР°РјСӢСҒ), 7 new `РҙР°ТӣСӢР»` species (Р°СҖРҝР°, СҒТұР»СӢ, СӮР°СҖСӢ, Р¶ТҜРіРөСҖС–, РәТҜРҪРұР°Т“СӢСҒ, Р·СӢТ“СӢСҖ, РјР°ТӣСӮР° вҖ” existing `РҙР°ТӣСӢР»` parent in food.jsonl), and 6 `part_of` relations (Р¶Р°РҝСӢСҖР°Тӣ/СӮР°РјСӢСҖ/РұТұСӮР°Тӣ/СҒР°РұР°Тӣ/РұТҜСҖСҲС–Рә/СӮТұТӣСӢРј part_of Р°Т“Р°СҲ/У©СҒС–РјРҙС–Рә). Cross-domain leverage: parents `Р°Т“Р°СҲ`/`РіТҜР»`/`СҲУ©Рҝ`/`РҙР°ТӣСӢР»` already in biology_basic + food, so each new child immediately gets R1 transitivity (e.g. `ТӣР°Р№СӢТЈ вҶ’ Р°Т“Р°СҲ вҶ’ У©СҒС–РјРҙС–Рә вҶ’ СӮС–СҖСҲС–Р»С–Рә РёРөСҒС–`) and R5 shared-IsA at both levels.

2. **`professions.jsonl`** (40 entries / 40 facts) вҖ” **highest-leverage R5 hub**. Pre-v4.0.9 `РјР°РјР°РҪ` hub had ~10 children scattered across transport (РҝРёР»РҫСӮ, РәР°РҝРёСӮР°РҪ, РјР°СҲРёРҪРёСҒСӮ, Р¶ТҜСҖРіС–Р·СғСҲС–), clothing (Р·РөСҖРіРөСҖ, СӮС–РіС–РҪСҲС–), kz_literature (Р°ТӣСӢРҪ, Р¶Р°Р·СғСҲСӢ), proverbs (ТұСҒСӮР°Р·). Added **40 new professions** all native Kazakh: РјТұТ“Р°Р»С–Рј, РҫТӣСӢСӮСғСҲСӢ, СӮУҷСҖРұРёРөСҲС–, РҙУҷСҖС–РіРөСҖ, РјРөРҙРұРёРәРө, Т“Р°Р»СӢРј, СҒСғСҖРөСӮСҲС–, СҒР°Р·РіРөСҖ, УҷРҪСҲС–, РұРёСҲС–, РәТҜР№СҲС–, Р¶СӢСҖСҲСӢ, СҒР°СӮСғСҲСӢ, СҒР°СғРҙР°РіРөСҖ, Р°СҒРҝР°Р·, РҪР°СғРұР°Р№СҲСӢ, РөРіС–РҪСҲС–, РјР°Р»СҲСӢ, СҲРҫРҝР°РҪ, Р¶СӢР»ТӣСӢСҲСӢ, Р°ТЈСҲСӢ, РұР°Р»СӢТӣСҲСӢ, ТұСҒСӮР°, РөСӮС–РәСҲС–, РҙР°СҖТӣР°РҪ, РұР°ТӣРұР°РҪ, ТӣТұСҖСӢР»СӢСҒСҲСӢ, Р¶ТұРјСӢСҒСҲСӢ, Р¶У©РҪРҙРөСғСҲС–, Р·Р°ТЈРіРөСҖ, С…Р°СӮСҲСӢ, СӮУ©СҖР°Т“Р°, РұР°СҒСӮСӢТӣ, СҒР°СҖРұР°Р·, Р¶Р°СғСӢРҪРіРөСҖ, СӮС–Р»РјР°СҲ, Р°СғРҙР°СҖРјР°СҲСӢ, СӮС–Р»СҲС–, РөРјСҲС–, Р¶Р°СӮСӮСӢТӣСӮСӢСҖСғСҲСӢ. Avoided loanwords (РјРөРҪРөРҙР¶РөСҖ, РёРҪР¶РөРҪРөСҖ, РҝСҖРҫРіСҖР°РјРјРёСҒСӮ, Р°РәСӮРөСҖ вҖ” all skipped). **Expected R5 leverage**: РјР°РјР°РҪ hub now has ~50 children вҶ’ C(50,2) = 1 225 RelatedTo pairs vs pre-batch C(10,2) = 45, **27Г— increase**.

3. **`tools_household.jsonl`** (30 entries / 30 facts) вҖ” **ТӣТұСҖР°Р» + СӢРҙСӢСҒ dual hub**. `ТӣТұСҖР°Р»` hub children: 18 concrete tools (РҝСӢСҲР°Тӣ, РұР°Р»СӮР°, РұР°Р»Т“Р°, Р°СҖР°, ТӣР°Р№СҲСӢ, РёРҪРө, РәТҜСҖРөРә, СӮСӢСҖРјР°, РҫСҖР°Тӣ, СҲР°Р»Т“СӢ, Р°СҖТӣР°РҪ, ТӣР°Р»Р°Рј, ТӣР°СҖСӢРҪРҙР°СҲ, РҙУҷРҝСӮРөСҖ, СҒР°РұСӢРҪ, СҲТҜРұРөСҖРөРә, СҒСӢРҝСӢСҖТ“СӢСҲ, РҝС–СҒРҝРөРә). New `СӢРҙСӢСҒ` sub-hub under ТӣТұСҖР°Р»: 11 vessels (СӮР°РұР°Тӣ, РәРөСҒРө, ТӣР°СҒСӢТӣ, СҲР°РҪСӢСҲТӣСӢ, СҲУҷР№РҪРөРә, СҒР°РјР°СғСӢСҖ, ТӣР°Р·Р°РҪ, ТӣТұРјСӢСҖР°, СҲРөР»РөРә, РҫР¶Р°Сғ, СӮРҫСҒСӮР°Т“Р°РҪ). `РҝС–СҒРҝРөРә` and `СӮРҫСҖСҒСӢТӣ`-style traditional Kazakh items included to keep the domain culturally grounded.

**4 983 new derivations / 105 new curated facts = +47 derivations per fact** вҖ” **3.6Г— higher leverage than v4.0.7's +13/fact**. Concentrating on the РјР°РјР°РҪ hub paid off: R5 shared-IsA alone gained **+4 887** (the dense profession cluster cross-chaining with existing СӮСҖР°РҪСҒРҝРҫСҖСӮ / Р°СғСӢР»СҲР°СҖСғР°СҲСӢР»СӢТӣ / РҫРұСҖР°Р· clusters). v4.0.7 had no equivalent hub concentration вҖ” 42 transport entries spread across 3 sub-clusters (vehicles, infrastructure, professions) each gave ~C(13,2) at most.

### Pipeline cost (fast-path win)

v4.0.9 full rebuild (3 domains, 105 entries added, all validation + extraction + reasoning + graph):
- validate_world_core: ~0.5 s
- extract_facts --world-core-only: <1 s
- run_reasoner: 2 s
- build_lexical_graph: <1 s
- **Total data pipeline: ~4 s**

Pre-v4.0.8 equivalent workflow (3Г— per-domain patches, full extract each):
- 3 Г— (45 min extract + 2 s reasoner + <1 s graph) = **~135 min**

**~2 000Г— pipeline speedup on a 3-domain batch**. Confirms the v4.0.8 infrastructure thesis empirically.

### Scope discipline

Three domains, one patch, one coherent direction (expand curated knowledge). No code changes вҖ” purely additive data. 463 tests pass unchanged. Next v4.0.10: could batch another 3 domains (music_kz, sports, education are the queued candidates) вҖ” or rotate axes back to rules / noise-elimination depending on where Codex review surfaces the highest-value target next.

## [4.0.8] вҖ” 2026-04-24 вҖ” `extract_facts --world-core-only` fast-path (throughput infrastructure)

Axis rotation toward **tooling throughput**. The previous five patches (v4.0.3 вҶ’ v4.0.7) spent ~2 hours each, of which ~45 min was a full re-extract over 200 k text samples that produced the same text-facts every time and only differed in the `world_core/` slice. At the user's explicit concern ("СӮСҖР°СӮРёСӮСҢ 2 СҮР°СҒР° РҪР° РҫРҙРёРҪ РҝР°СӮСҮ СҒРёР»СҢРҪРҫ СҖР°СҒСӮРҫСҮРёСӮРөР»СҢРҪРҫ"), v4.0.8 lands a one-time infrastructure patch that turns that 45-minute step into a ~1-second re-merge for any world_core-only change.

### Design

New `--world-core-only` flag on `extract_facts`:

1. Read the committed `data/retrieval/facts.json`.
2. `retain` every fact whose `source.pack` does **not** start with `world_core/`.
3. Re-load `data/world_core/*.jsonl` via the existing `load_world_core_facts` loader.
4. Merge the fresh curated facts, recompute `by_predicate` / `by_pack` / `facts_total` from scratch.
5. Stamp `version = CARGO_PKG_VERSION`, `status = "world_core_refresh"` (new sentinel value вҖ” downstream consumers treat any `status` as first-class per the v3.1.0 iteration contract), rewrite.

Text-extraction state (`built_from`, `packs_completed`, `packs_total`, `samples_scanned`, `samples_with_facts`) is preserved verbatim вҖ” the fast-path makes no claim about the text corpus, so it inherits those fields from the source artifact. A regression to those numbers requires a full `extract_facts` run (with `--bench-order --max-total 200000` for the canonical T4_200k tier).

Mutually exclusive with `--full`, `--bench-order`, `--max-total` вҖ” the binary fails fast if combined.

### Measured equivalence

Baseline: committed `facts.json` @ v4.0.7 (status `"completed"`, 2 476 s elapsed). Ran `--world-core-only` and diffed byte-for-byte:

```
diff /tmp/facts_baseline.json data/retrieval/facts.json
3,4c3,4
<   "status": "completed",
<   "elapsed_s": 2476,
---
>   "status": "world_core_refresh",
>   "elapsed_s": 0,
```

**Only `status` + `elapsed_s` differ** вҖ” both intentional markers. Every one of 13 745 facts, every `by_predicate` / `by_pack` count, every source chain, byte-identical. The fast-path is provably equivalent to a full re-extract when only `data/world_core/*.jsonl` has changed.

### Measured throughput win

| | full extract | fast-path |
|---|---:|---:|
| wall-clock (M2, release) | ~41 min (2 476 s) | **<1 s** (2.5 s including cargo startup) |
| text packs scanned | 9 (6 completed under the 200 k cap) | 0 |
| FST parses | ~3 M | 0 |

**~1 500Г— speedup** on the dominant cost of a world_core-only patch. The next 3вҖ“4 curated-knowledge patches alone recoup the ~30 min invested in this infrastructure change.

### Impact on release rhythm

Data-only patches (the axis rotation tracked in `project_v4_direction`: `world_core`, `domains`) drop from ~2 h вҶ’ ~30 min end-to-end вҖ” cargo test + bump + docs + tag become the dominant cost, not extraction. This unblocks the "batch 3вҖ“5 domains per patch" direction the user flagged at v4.0.7: with the fast-path in place, adding 5 domains now rebuilds in seconds instead of 4 Г— 45 min = 3 h of serial re-extraction.

### Scope discipline

Single-concern patch: one new flag, one new helper function, zero changes to extractor logic, zero new predicates, zero test-count change (463 passing, unchanged from v4.0.7 вҖ” correctness baseline preserved). Exactly the one-concern-per-patch rhythm the v4.x cadence was set up for.

**Guardrail**: the fast-path is **only** correct when text-extraction output is unchanged. Any patch that touches pattern matchers, the lexicon, or the corpus MUST still run a full extract. This is documented in the binary's help output and the `status = "world_core_refresh"` sentinel makes the provenance trivially greppable.

## [4.0.7] вҖ” 2026-04-23 вҖ” World Core expansion: new `transport.jsonl` domain

Axis rotation. Two consecutive patches (v4.0.5, v4.0.6) cleaned noise; time to grow clean knowledge. v4.0.7 adds a **14th World Core domain** вҖ” `transport.jsonl` вҖ” along the "domains" axis of the knowledge-first direction (`project_v4_direction`).

### New domain вҖ” `transport.jsonl`

**42 entries / 42 facts**. Classic transport taxonomy centred on the `РәУ©Р»С–Рә` (transport / vehicle) hub:

- **Vehicle hierarchy** (13 direct IsA РәУ©Р»С–Рә): РјР°СҲРёРҪР°, Р°РІСӮРҫРјРҫРұРёР»СҢ, РҝРҫР№СӢР·, ТұСҲР°Тӣ, РәРөРјРө, РІРөР»РҫСҒРёРҝРөРҙ, РјРҫСӮРҫСҶРёРәР», Р°РІСӮРҫРұСғСҒ, СӮСҖР°РјРІР°Р№, РјРөСӮСҖРҫ, СӮСҖРҫР»Р»РөР№РұСғСҒ, СӮР°РәСҒРё, СӮС–РәТұСҲР°Тӣ, Р¶ТҜРә РјР°СҲРёРҪР°СҒСӢ.
- **Infrastructure**: Р¶РҫР» + subclasses (РәУ©СҲРө, РҙР°ТЈТ“СӢР», СӮР°СҒ Р¶РҫР», СӮРөРјС–СҖ Р¶РҫР», РәУ©РҝС–СҖ), facilities (Р°СҚСҖРҫРҝРҫСҖСӮ, РІРҫРәР·Р°Р», РҝРҫСҖСӮ, Р°СҸР»РҙР°РјР°, РұРөРәРөСӮ).
- **Professions**: Р¶ТҜСҖРіС–Р·СғСҲС–, РҝРёР»РҫСӮ, РәР°РҝРёСӮР°РҪ, РјР°СҲРёРҪРёСҒСӮ, Р¶РҫР»Р°СғСҲСӢ.
- **Substances / parts**: РҫСӮСӢРҪ (+ РұРөРҪР·РёРҪ, РҙРёР·РөР»СҢ, РәРөСҖРҫСҒРёРҪ), РҙУ©ТЈРіРөР»РөРә, РјРҫСӮРҫСҖ.
- **Actions / events**: ТӣРҫР·Т“Р°Р»СӢСҒ, РәРөРјРө вҶ’ СӮРөТЈС–Р·, ТұСҲР°Тӣ вҶ’ Р°СҚСҖРҫРҝРҫСҖСӮ.

### Shared-IsA leverage

The 13 vehicles as direct children of `РәУ©Р»С–Рә` give R5 shared-IsA up to **C(13,2) = 78** RelatedTo pairs on one hub alone. Professions cluster (4 direct maРјР°РҪ children) вҶ’ C(4,2)=6 more. Road hierarchy gives subclass R1 transitivity through В«РәУ©СҲРө IsA Р¶РҫР»В», В«РҙР°ТЈТ“СӢР» IsA РәУ©СҲРөВ», В«СӮРөРјС–СҖ Р¶РҫР» IsA Р¶РҫР»В», etc.

| World Core facts | 601 | **643** | +42 |

Plus РҫСӮСӢРҪ cluster joining substances, plus qРҫР·Т“Р°Р»СӢСҒ joining the action hub.

### Graph

Nodes: 3 284 вҶ’ **3 315** (+31); edges: 12 308 вҶ’ **12 350** (+42). Most-connected content nouns unchanged: Р°РҙР°Рј (289), Р¶РөСҖ (218), РҙТҜРҪРёРө (207), ТӣР°Р·Р°Тӣ (201), Р¶СӢР» (151).

### Single-curated-domain knowledge leverage

The patch adds 42 curated facts and produces **+555 rule derivations** вҖ” a net-effective knowledge-growth ratio of ~13Г— per added fact through the reasoner's cross-chain multiplier. This is exactly the compounding effect the World Core direction targets: one human-authored fact reverberates through existing curated structure to produce many provably correct downstream claims.

### What's next

Axes continue to rotate per `project_v4_direction`:
- **World Core**: more domains (materials / tools / weather / emotions / sports) or expansion of existing ones.

- **Corpus**: long-horizon FST-synthetic data generation.
